# `cc-journal standup`

- **Usage**: `cc-journal standup [--copy] [--slack [CHANNEL]] [DATE]`

Print daily standup report

## Arguments

### `[DATE]`

Target date (YYYY-MM-DD, default: today)

## Flags

### `--copy`

Copy output to clipboard

### `--slack [CHANNEL]`

Send to Slack (optional channel override)
